items.title: Mourners Chant ‘Revenge’ at Funeral Prayers for Iran’s Slain Supreme Leader
items.summary: On the second day of public mourning for Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, who was killed in February, there was still no sign of his son and successor, Mojtaba Khamenei.
